title: Adult Social Care Learning and Development Support Scheme
body: " Eligible adult social care employers in England can claim staff training costs from the Adult Social Care Learning and Development Support Scheme (LDSS), including for the Oliver McGowan Mandatory Training on Learning Disability and Autism.  The LDSS is available for non-regulated care staff, including deputy and Care Quality Commission-registered managers and agency staff, within the adult social care workforce.  The LDSS guidance and LDSS grant determination: 2025 to 2026 have been updated to include information on making claims for the Oliver McGowan Mandatory Training on Learning Disability and Autism, including eligibility criteria, maximum reimbursement rates and evidence requirements. "
